def __init__(self, file_path: str, lines: List[str]):
        self.file_path = file_path
        self.lines = lines
        self.heading_path = f"{file_path} (preamble)"
        self.heading_level = 0
        self.start_line = 1
        self.code_blocks = []
        self.fence_line_ranges = [] # list of (start_idx, end_idx) 0-indexed
